properties.headline: TEST FIXTURE Severe Thunderstorm Warning until 7:15PM CDT (reaped-whirlwind --test-email)
properties.description: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. Quarter-size hail and 60 mph wind gusts reported with a line of storms moving east at 40 mph.
properties.instruction: TEST FIXTURE — do not act. (Real NWS instruction would say: For your protection move to an interior room on the lowest floor of a building.)
